# X Y U V - Example unstructured velocity data

10.0 0.0 1.5 0.1
20.0 0.0 2.0 0.2
30.0 0.0 2.5 0.3
40.0 0.0 3.0 0.4
0.0 10.0 1.0 0.1

20.0 10.0 2.0 0.3
30.0 10.0 2.5 0.4
40.0 10.0 3.0 0.5

10.0 20.0 1.5 0.3
20.0 20.0 2.0 0.4
30.0 20.0 2.5 0.5
